title: Fed Signals Potential Rate Cut as Core PCE Cools to 2.4%
content: The Federal Reserve indicated it may cut interest rates in September 2026 after core PCE inflation eased to 2.4%, approaching the 2% target. Fed officials noted the labor market remains resilient but price pressures are moderating. Equity markets rallied on the news with the S&P 500 gaining 1.2%. Bond yields declined sharply with the 10-year Treasury falling to 4.15%.
author: fixture
